university.name: KL University (Koneru Lakshmaiah Education Foundation)
university.location: Green Fields, Vaddeswaram, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh - 522302

admissions.overview: KL University offers admissions to UG, PG, and PhD programs every academic year. The university follows a merit-based, transparent admission process.

ug_eligibility.engineering: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Maths with minimum 60% marks
ug_eligibility.science: 10+2 with PCB or PCM with minimum 55% marks
ug_eligibility.management: 10+2 in any stream with minimum 55% marks
ug_eligibility.arts: 10+2 in any stream with minimum 50% marks

pg_eligibility.mtech: B.Tech/B.E with minimum 60% marks in relevant branch
pg_eligibility.mba: Any Bachelor's degree with minimum 55% marks + entrance test
pg_eligibility.msc: B.Sc in relevant subject with minimum 55% marks

entrance_exams: EAMCET (AP/TS) - Primary route for local students
JEE Main - All India Common Entrance
KLUEEE - KL University's own entrance exam
application_steps: Step 2: Register with valid email and phone number
Step 3: Fill the online application form
Step 4: Upload required documents (certificates, photos, ID proof)
Step 6: Appear for KLUEEE or submit qualifying exam scores
Step 8: Pay fees and confirm seat

reservation_policy.sc_st: 15% seats reserved as per UGC norms

international_admissions.process: International students can apply through the International Admissions Office
international_admissions.scholarship_amount: Up to 50% tuition fee waiver for meritorious international students

credit_system.grading: 10-point grade scale (O, A+, A, B+, B, C, D, F)

placements.overview: KL University has an outstanding placement record. The Training and Placement Cell (TPC) at KLU maintains strong industry connections and ensures maximum student employability.

placement_cell.location: Placement Block, R Block Ground Floor

training_programs.name: KLUEEE Aptitude Training
training_programs.description: 30-hour aptitude, reasoning & verbal ability training for campus placements

training_programs.name: Technical Skill Development
training_programs.description: Coding bootcamps in C, Java, Python, DSA for 3rd year students

training_programs.name: Soft Skills & Communication
training_programs.description: Group discussions, mock interviews, presentation skills with industry experts

training_programs.name: Industry Certification Program
training_programs.description: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud certification prep

placement_activities: Coding Contests with placement referrals as prizes

achievements: Students have represented India in International Robotics competitions
KLU Students won National Smart India Hackathon 2023
Multiple students selected for ISRO internship programs
KLU Cricket team won inter-university zonal championship 2024
Students published 200+ research papers in international journals
50+ startups founded by KLU alumni and current students
Students won prestigious ACM ICPC Regional rounds
KLU won Best Technical Fest Award at national level
Women students won National-level Science Olympiad 2024

centers_of_excellence.name: Center of Excellence in AI & ML
centers_of_excellence.focus: Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision

centers_of_excellence.name: Center of Excellence in IoT
centers_of_excellence.focus: Smart Devices, Industrial IoT, Edge Computing

centers_of_excellence.name: Center of Excellence in Data Analytics
centers_of_excellence.focus: Big Data, Business Intelligence, Predictive Analytics

libraries.name: Dr. K.L.N. Prasad Central Library
libraries.e_library: 24/7 access to IEEE, Elsevier, Springer, Scopus databases

labs.description: State-of-the-art labs equipped with latest hardware and software

wifi.zones: All classrooms, hostels, library, cafeteria, open areas

C_block.name: C Block – Engineering Labs & Lecture Halls
facilities: Project Rooms for Final Year Students

S_block.name: S Block – Seminar, Student Services & Innovation

annual_fests.name: Samyak
annual_fests.description: KLU's flagship technical festival featuring national-level coding, robotics, and innovation competitions

annual_fests.name: Surabhi
annual_fests.description: KLU's grand cultural extravaganza celebrating arts, music, dance, and entertainment

hostel.overview: KL University provides excellent hostel facilities for both boys and girls within the campus, ensuring safety, comfort, and academic focus.
facilities: RO Water purifiers on every floor
rules: Curfew for boys: 10:00 PM weekdays, 11:00 PM weekends
Curfew for girls: 9:00 PM weekdays, 10:00 PM weekends
Visitors allowed only in visitor's lounge
Ragging is a punishable offense with immediate expulsion
Overnight outings require written parental consent

mess_food.overview: KL University provides nutritious, hygienic, and delicious meals through a well-managed Hostel Mess. The menu is planned by a dietitian to ensure balanced nutrition for students.
hygiene: Daily kitchen inspection by health officer
Food samples stored for 24 hours for safety checks
Staff wear gloves, aprons, and hairnets mandatorily
Water purification by RO + UV system
Vegetables sourced from certified organic farms

breakfast.main: Idli (3 pcs) with Sambar and Coconut Chutney

lunch.main: Rice + Tomato Dal + Mix Veg Curry

breakfast.main: Pesarattu (green gram dosa) + Upma + Ginger Chutney
Idli (2) + Vada (1) + Mini Medu Vada + Onion Uttapam

lunch.side: Raita + Mirchi Ka Salan + Onion Salad

special_occasions: Festival specials (Diwali sweets, Holi special thali, Pongal celebration meal)
Vegan/Jain meal on request (24-hour advance notice)

scholarships.name: AP/TS State Government Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Full or partial tuition fee reimbursement

payment_methods: Online payment via KLU Student Portal
Education Loan (SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis Bank tie-ups)

academic_calendar.registration: Online registration via KLU portal 2 weeks before semester start
academic_calendar.grade_release: Within 3 weeks of end exam completion
academic_calendar.academic_audit: Once per year by internal & external committees
